PreToolUse.command: echo "[HOOK] 强制前后端规则：禁止写死静态数字，所有数据必须从 API/WebSocket 获取。检查：fetch() + WebSocket + auth token + 错误处理 + 空状态。"

PostToolUse.command: cd "e:/me/Python/quantitative trading" && python -c "import sys; html=open('trading_dashboard.html','r',encoding='utf-8').read(); checks={'apiGet':'REST API','apiPost':'POST API','WebSocket':'WebSocket','Authorization':'JWT auth','showToast':'error handling','empty-state':'empty state'}; missing=[v for k,v in checks.items() if k not in html]; print('[VALIDATE] All checks passed' if not missing else f'[WARN] Missing: {missing}')"
